claims.subject: dialer_hubspot_integration_outage
claims.evidence: the calls weren't logging properly into hubspot. i lost a lot of activity tracking in that gap. some of my dials don't show up in my numbers because of it which is frustrating when the manager looks at my activity report

claims.subject: recycled_leads
claims.evidence: you can tell because the notes on the record say things like spoke six months ago not ready. i don't know why we're calling them again with no new context.
claims.object_value: previously contacted ~6 months ago, marked not ready, re-queued with no new context
